title: SuerEchoY's Matrix
subTitle: 从芯片硅片到具身智能的全栈探索
style: <style>.intro-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,107,117,0.1) 0%, rgba(38,166,65,0.1) 100%); border: 1px solid #26a641; border-radius: 12px; padding: 25px; margin-bottom: 30px; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(5px); } .intro-card h3 { margin-top: 0; color: #26a641; font-size: 1.5em; } .intro-card p { margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--color-fg-default); line-height: 1.6; } .intro-links { margin-top: 20px; } .intro-links a { display: inline-block; margin-right: 15px; padding: 8px 18px; background: #26a641; color: #fff !important; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .intro-links a:hover { background: #1e8733; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(38,166,65,0.4); } .SideNav-item { background: var(--color-canvas-subtle); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-default); border-radius: 10px !important; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 16px; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1); } .SideNav-item:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(38,166,65,0.15); border-color: #26a641; border-left: 6px solid #26a641; } .avatar { border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(38,166,65,0.5); border: 2px solid #26a641; transition: transform 0.5s ease; } .avatar:hover { transform: rotate(360deg); }</style>
bottomText: Powered by Gmeek | Code is Law, Hardware is the World.
